title: genista tricuspidata var. cirtensis
intro: Genista tricuspidata var. cirtensis, also known as the Cretan broom or Cretan genista, is a type of flowering shrub that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation, thanks to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Genista tricuspidata var. cirtensis include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, including eczema, acne, and minor wounds.
